name: copilotprompts-m365-prompt-architect
title: Prompt Architect - Craft, Test & Refine AI Prompts
shortDescription: A guided meta-prompt that helps you design, test, and refine effective prompts for Copilot and AI assistants.
longDescription: This meta-prompt helps users turn a rough idea or existing prompt into a structured, production-ready prompt for Copilot and AI assistants, complete with persona, instructions, and worked examples in professional French.
